label.es: Inicio del periodo activo de vegetación (día del año)
label.zh: 植被活跃期开始（年积日）

definition.en: Integer day of year marking the start of the Vegetation Active Period.
definition.es: Día del año, expresado como entero, que marca el inicio del Periodo Activo de Vegetación.
definition.fi: Vuodenpäivä kokonaislukuna, joka osoittaa kasvillisuuden aktiivisen kauden alun.
definition.ro: Ziua anului, exprimată ca număr întreg, care marchează începutul Perioadei Active a Vegetației.
definition.zh: 以整数表示的一年中的某一天，用于标记植被活跃期的开始。

definition.en: Indicator describing observed phenological change from a SOS/VAP time series without requiring an external climate variable.
definition.es: Indicador que describe el cambio fenológico observado a partir de una serie SOS/VAP sin requerir una variable climática externa.
definition.fi: Indikaattori, joka kuvaa havaittua fenologista muutosta SOS/VAP-aikasarjasta ilman ulkoista ilmastomuuttujaa.
definition.ro: Indicator care descrie schimbarea fenologică observată dintr-o serie temporală SOS/PAV fără o variabilă climatică externă.
definition.zh: 从 SOS/VAP 时间序列描述观测到的物候变化的指标，不需要外部气候变量。

definition.en: Rate of temporal phenological change estimated as the Theil-Sen slope of SOS/VAP against year, expressed in days per year.
definition.es: Velocidad del cambio fenológico temporal estimada como la pendiente Theil-Sen de SOS/VAP frente al año, expresada en días por año.
definition.fi: Ajallisen fenologisen muutoksen nopeus, arvioituna SOS/VAP-arvon Theil-Sen-kulmakertoimena suhteessa vuoteen, yksikkönä päivää vuodessa.
definition.ro: Rata schimbării fenologice temporale estimată ca panta Theil-Sen a SOS/PAV față de an, exprimată în zile pe an.
definition.zh: 以 SOS/VAP 相对于年份的 Theil-Sen 斜率估计的时间物候变化速率，单位为天/年。

definition.en: Difference between recent mean SOS/VAP and baseline mean SOS/VAP.
definition.es: Diferencia entre la media reciente de SOS/VAP y la media de referencia de SOS/VAP.
definition.fi: Viimeaikaisen SOS/VAP-keskiarvon ja vertailujakson SOS/VAP-keskiarvon erotus.
definition.ro: Diferența dintre media recentă SOS/PAV și media de referință SOS/PAV.
definition.zh: 近期 SOS/VAP 平均值与基准期 SOS/VAP 平均值之间的差值。

definition.en: Year of the most probable change point detected with the Pettitt test.
definition.es: Año del punto de cambio más probable detectado mediante el test de Pettitt.
definition.fi: Pettittin testillä havaitun todennäköisimmän muutospisteen vuosi.
definition.ro: Anul celui mai probabil punct de schimbare detectat cu testul Pettitt.
definition.zh: 使用 Pettitt 检验检测到的最可能变化点的年份。

label.es: Valor p del punto de cambio
label.ro: Valoarea p a punctului de schimbare

definition.en: Statistical significance of the detected change point according to the Pettitt test.
definition.es: Significancia estadística del punto de cambio detectado según el test de Pettitt.
definition.fi: Pettittin testin mukainen havaitun muutospisteen tilastollinen merkitsevyys.
definition.ro: Semnificația statistică a punctului de schimbare detectat conform testului Pettitt.
definition.zh: 根据 Pettitt 检验得到的检测变化点的统计显著性。

definition.en: Categorical bioclimatic zone associated with a grid cell or spatial feature.
definition.es: Zona bioclimática categórica asociada a una celda de malla o entidad espacial.
definition.fi: Ruutuun tai spatiaaliseen kohteeseen liittyvä luokiteltu bioklimaattinen vyöhyke.
definition.ro: Zonă bioclimatică categorială asociată unei celule de grilă sau unei entități spațiale.
definition.zh: 与网格单元或空间要素相关联的分类生物气候区。

definition.en: Robust estimator of a temporal trend calculated as the median of pairwise slopes.
definition.es: Estimador robusto de tendencia temporal calculado como la mediana de las pendientes por pares.
definition.fi: Ajallisen trendin robusti estimaattori, joka lasketaan parittaisten kulmakertoimien mediaanina.
definition.ro: Estimator robust al unei tendințe temporale calculat ca mediana pantelor pereche.
definition.zh: 作为成对斜率中位数计算的时间趋势稳健估计量。

definition.en: Non-parametric test used to detect a single change point in a time series.
definition.es: Test no paramétrico utilizado para detectar un único punto de cambio en una serie temporal.
definition.fi: Epäparametrinen testi, jolla havaitaan yksi muutospiste aikasarjassa.
definition.ro: Test neparametric folosit pentru detectarea unui singur punct de schimbare într-o serie temporală.
definition.zh: 用于检测时间序列中单个变化点的非参数检验。

definition.en: Method computing an anomaly as recent-period mean minus baseline-period mean.
definition.es: Método que calcula una anomalía como media del periodo reciente menos media del periodo de referencia.
definition.fi: Menetelmä, jossa poikkeama lasketaan vähentämällä vertailujakson keskiarvo viimeaikaisen jakson keskiarvosta.
definition.ro: Metodă care calculează anomalia ca media perioadei recente minus media perioadei de referință.
definition.zh: 将近期平均值减去基准期平均值来计算异常的方法。

definition.en: Catalog-driven web viewer that renders CoverageJSON grids and resolves parameter attributes against an ontology index.
definition.es: Visor web basado en catálogo que representa mallas CoverageJSON y resuelve los atributos de los parámetros contra un índice ontológico.
definition.fi: Luettelo-ohjattu verkkokatselin, joka näyttää CoverageJSON-ruudukot ja yhdistää parametrien attribuutit ontologiaindeksiin.
definition.ro: Vizualizator web bazat pe catalog care redă grile CoverageJSON și rezolvă atributele parametrilor printr-un index ontologic.
definition.zh: 由目录驱动的 Web 查看器，用于渲染 CoverageJSON 网格并根据本体索引解析参数属性。

definition.en: CoverageJSON resource or dataset currently selected in the viewer.
definition.es: Recurso o conjunto de datos CoverageJSON seleccionado actualmente en el visor.
definition.fi: CoverageJSON resource or dataset currently selected in the viewer.
definition.ro: CoverageJSON resource or dataset currently selected in the viewer.
definition.zh: CoverageJSON resource or dataset currently selected in the viewer.

definition.en: CoverageJSON parameter selected for visualisation; it identifies the measured, observed or derived attribute.
definition.es: Parámetro CoverageJSON seleccionado para la visualización; identifica el atributo medido, observado o derivado.
definition.fi: CoverageJSON parameter selected for visualisation; it identifies the measured, observed or derived attribute.
definition.ro: CoverageJSON parameter selected for visualisation; it identifies the measured, observed or derived attribute.
definition.zh: CoverageJSON parameter selected for visualisation; it identifies the measured, observed or derived attribute.

definition.en: Numerical or categorical value stored in the selected CoverageJSON range for the clicked grid cell.
definition.es: Valor numérico o categórico almacenado en el rango CoverageJSON seleccionado para la celda de malla pulsada.
definition.fi: Numerical or categorical value stored in the selected CoverageJSON range for the clicked grid cell.
definition.ro: Numerical or categorical value stored in the selected CoverageJSON range for the clicked grid cell.
definition.zh: Numerical or categorical value stored in the selected CoverageJSON range for the clicked grid cell.

definition.en: Row and column index of the grid cell clicked in the CoverageJSON domain.
definition.es: Índice de fila y columna de la celda de malla pulsada en el dominio CoverageJSON.
definition.fi: Row and column index of the grid cell clicked in the CoverageJSON domain.
definition.ro: Row and column index of the grid cell clicked in the CoverageJSON domain.
definition.zh: Row and column index of the grid cell clicked in the CoverageJSON domain.

definition.en: Geographic coordinates of the clicked map location, expressed as latitude and longitude.
definition.es: Coordenadas geográficas del punto pulsado en el mapa, expresadas como latitud y longitud.
definition.fi: Geographic coordinates of the clicked map location, expressed as latitude and longitude.
definition.ro: Geographic coordinates of the clicked map location, expressed as latitude and longitude.
definition.zh: Geographic coordinates of the clicked map location, expressed as latitude and longitude.

definition.en: Human-readable semantic definition associated with the selected attribute or parameter.
definition.es: Definición semántica legible asociada al atributo o parámetro seleccionado.
definition.fi: Human-readable semantic definition associated with the selected attribute or parameter.
definition.ro: Human-readable semantic definition associated with the selected attribute or parameter.
definition.zh: Human-readable semantic definition associated with the selected attribute or parameter.

definition.en: Type or class assigned to the selected semantic term in the ontology index.
definition.es: Tipo o clase asignada al término semántico seleccionado en el índice ontológico.
definition.fi: Type or class assigned to the selected semantic term in the ontology index.
definition.ro: Type or class assigned to the selected semantic term in the ontology index.
definition.zh: Type or class assigned to the selected semantic term in the ontology index.

definition.en: Unit of measure associated with the selected CoverageJSON parameter.
definition.es: Unidad de medida asociada al parámetro CoverageJSON seleccionado.
definition.fi: Unit of measure associated with the selected CoverageJSON parameter.
definition.ro: Unit of measure associated with the selected CoverageJSON parameter.
definition.zh: Unit of measure associated with the selected CoverageJSON parameter.

definition.en: Persistent identifier that links the selected attribute or field to its semantic definition.
definition.es: Identificador persistente que conecta el atributo o campo seleccionado con su definición semántica.
definition.fi: Persistent identifier that links the selected attribute or field to its semantic definition.
definition.ro: Persistent identifier that links the selected attribute or field to its semantic definition.
definition.zh: Persistent identifier that links the selected attribute or field to its semantic definition.
